Name: Distribution Pole Replacement
Description: Replace damaged or at risk distribution poles complying with LUMA standards

Name: Hotspot Inspection
Description: Perform hotspot inspections and corresponding repairs on distribution lines and distribution assets

Name: Visual Inspection
Description: Perform visual inspections and corresponding repairs on distribution lines and distribution assets

Name: FCI Installation
Description: Install Fault Current Indicators on Distribution Lines

Name: Cutout Installation
Description: Install sectionalizing fuse cutouts in currently unprotected distribution laterals

Name: Fuse Coordination
Description: Perform fuse changes according to fuse and recloser coordination reports for proper sectionalizing and protection operation schemes.

Name: Distribution Automation
Description: Install new reclosing devices in distribution lines

Name: Distribution Line Rebuild
Description: Rebuild entire segments of distribution lines

Name: Distribution Transformer Voltage Correction
Description: Through data captured by AMI, start tackling voltage and safety issues in secondary lines between distribution transformers and meters.

Name: Overloaded Distribution Transformer
Description: Through data captured by AMI, start tackling overloaded distribution transformers by replacing them with higher capacity ones.

Name: Undergrounding
Description: Undergrounding at risk overhead lines that can be shown to have increased benefit cost analysis through undergrounding instead of periodical overhead repairs or reconstructions.

Name: Provisional Overhead Reconstruction
Description: Tackle the provisional overhead issue plaguing areas that have out of service underground infrastructure and were built overhead with poor or no standards as a way to reenergize clients in the area. Fixes can be to reconstruct the underground segments or to rebuild the overhead lines but to current LUMA modern standards.

Name: Vegetation Management
Description: Perform vegetation clearing activities and herbicide application on distribution right of way vegetation

Name: Transmission Pole Replacement
Description: Replace damaged or at risk transmission poles and towers complying with LUMA standards

Name: Insulator & Hardware Replacement
Description: Replace old, corroded, and/or damaged transmission insulators and hardware.

Name: Overhead Ground Wire Replacement
Description: Install missing segments of overhead ground wire that have fallen throughout time and are no longer present in transmission lines.

Name: 38kV Recloser Installation
Description: Install new reclosing devices in transmission lines

Name: Transmission Line Rebuild
Description: Rebuild entire segments of transmission lines

Name: Vegetation Management
Description: Perform vegetation clearing activities and herbicide application on transmission right of way vegetation

Name: Hotspot Inspection
Description: Perform hotspot inspections and corresponding repairs on transmission lines and transmission assets

Name: Visual Inspection
Description: Perform visual inspections and corresponding repairs on transmission lines and transmission assets

Name: cFCI Sensor Installation
Description: Install Communicating Fault Current Indicators on Distribution Lines

Name: Out of Service Breaker
Description: Bring back into service breakers that are not in service and are in need of repairs or replacements

Name: Breaker Replacement Project
Description: Replace breakers that are reaching or have reached their end of life

Name: Relay Modernization
Description: Replace electromagnetic relays with modern digital ones

Name: Out of Service RTU
Description: Bring back to service RTUs that are currently not in working condition and prevents the substation from communicating to system control through SCADA and therefore cannot be remotely operated nor have any visibility.

Name: Transformer Replacement Project
Description: Replace damaged, old, and at risk substation transformers with new ones.

Name: Substation Rebuild
Description: Rebuild entire substations with modern equipment and standards.

Name: Transformer Dissolved Gas Analysis
Description: Perform DGA analysis on all transformers on a cyclical basis

Name: Ground Grid Rebuild
Description: Rebuild the ground grid of substations that show improper grounding conditions that represent a hazard to the personnel and to the lines that depend on proper grounding for fault conditions and voltage measurements

Name: Hotspot Inspection
Description: Perform hotspot inspections and corresponding repairs on substations and substation assets

Name: Visual Inspection
Description: Perform visual inspections and corresponding repairs on substations and substation assets

Name: Vegetation Management
Description: Perform vegetation clearing activities and herbicide application on substation vegetation

Name: New Customer Connection
Description: Interconnection of new customers to the distribution grid or directly to transmission lines in case of industrial and commercial customers.

Name: Advanced Metering Infrastructure
Description: Replace all grid customer meters with new modern AMI 2.0 advanced meters

Name: BESS Interconnection
Description: Add BESS storage for peak shaving, frequency and voltage control.

Name: Renewable Interconnection
Description: Interconnect new renewable projects to the grid.
